refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns a version of the given geometry with given ordinate values swapped.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns a version of the given geometry with given ordinates swapped.
The ords parameter is a 2-characters string naming the ordinates to swap. Valid names are: x,y,z and m.

refsection.title: Example
refsection.programlisting: -- Scale M value by 2 SELECT ST_AsText( ST_SwapOrdinates( ST_Scale( ST_SwapOrdinates(g,'xm'), 2, 1 ), 'xm') ) FROM ( SELECT 'POINT ZM (0 0 0 2)'::geometry g ) foo; st_astext -------------------- POINT ZM (0 0 0 4)
